title: MSCI World verliert an Wert: So reagieren ETF-Anleger richtig
full_text: The MSCI World ETF is currently experiencing significant losses due to a tech correction in the US market, a weak dollar, and political uncertainties like new tariffs. With over 70% invested in US tech giants, the index is highly susceptible to these fluctuations. The article advises long-term investors to remain invested, consider diversifying into emerging markets or Europe, and assess their risk profile to potentially balance their portfolio with bonds or commodities.
